description_long: This object is a rectangular box with a mint green exterior, featuring a large, vibrant image of pink and magenta flowers with yellow centers on its main face. The box is labeled 'FLOWER 14' in bold black text, with additional smaller text below and a smaller duplicate image of the flowers in the lower right corner. The floral image shows a dense cluster of daisy-like flowers surrounded by green foliage, suggesting a lively and colorful garden scene. The box appears to be made of cardboard or a similar lightweight material, with smooth, flat surfaces and sharp edges. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, likely intended for decorative or packaging purposes. No visible openings, handles, or interactive components are present on the exterior.
description: A mint green rectangular box featuring a vivid image of pink and magenta daisy-like flowers and bold 'FLOWER 14' text. The box is smooth, modern, and likely used for packaging or display.
description_view_0: The front view displays the large floral image, 'FLOWER 14' text, and a smaller duplicate flower image in the lower right corner.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the floral image wrapping around the side, with the 'FLOWER 14' text partially visible and no small duplicate image.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, with the same large floral image, 'FLOWER 14' text, and small duplicate image in the lower right.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, with the floral image and partial text, but no small duplicate image.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged radially around a central yellow disc, with overlapping and layering typical of daisy-like composite flowers, exhibiting clear radial symmetry.
